rag_rules: Generate output guarantees using visible ports or eq helpers declared in the same annex; avoid subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Use AGREE logical operators (and, or, not, =>) and temporal patterns (e.g., 0.0 -> pre(t)) for stateful expressions.
Place guarantees in component type annexes only when based on visible inputs/outputs, not implementation bindings.
generic_rules: Relate outputs to visible inputs directly in guarantees without intermediate implementation details.
Declare helper variables with correct AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) to support type-safe expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use format: guarantee "label": expression; within annex agree {** ... **};
Use eq name : type = expression; to define typed helper variables for complex conditions.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use unresolved identifiers or invent declarations to fix type errors; delete invalid clauses instead.
